title: mentha × gracilis subsp. veronensis
intro: Mentha × gracilis subsp. veronensis, also known as Bergamot mint, is a subspecies of hybrid mint native to Europe. It is characterized by its unique fragrance and flavor, which is a combination of bergamot and mint. The medicinal properties of Bergamot mint include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. Bergamot mint can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, and its health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and relieving pain.
